name: voraus-opcua-generator

metadata.name: voraus-opcua-generator
metadata.summary: A library for robots that helps with a lot of things.

documentation:
# voraus OPC UA Generator

A library to generate OPC UA artifacts based on an xml nodeset (or a server) and target nodes, as well as an automated OPC UA server documentation builder.

Install the module in editable mode for development:

```
pip install -e .[dev]
```

## OPC UA Client Generator (Python)

This generates a typed client for a voraus OPC UA specification in form of a nodeset.

```
voraus-opcua-generator build-client-package motion_nodes.xml /tmp/my_robot_control_package/
```

## OPC UA Server XML Builder

The XML builder creates a OPC UA specification of a running OPC UA Server.

```
voraus-opcua-generator build-xml motion_nodes.xml
```

## OPC UA Server Documentation Builder

The documentation builder for OPC UA server XML files creates RST files for all nodes including methods and variables.
Code examples for each node are also generated. Note that the documentation builder will create a subdirectory including the documentation folder,
which **must not** be committed. You also have to include the base rst file to the doctree of your `index.rst` file.

```
voraus-opcua-generator build-docs motion_nodes.xml docs/
```

## How to use

Use the tools to configure own generator,
all classes can be generated to a single file
or multiple schemas can be generated to multiple files

```
# setup parser
schema_parser = NodesetParser("nodeset.xml") # or ClientParser("opc.tcp://<ip>:<port>")

# select target nodes
target_nodes: List[ua.NodeId] = [
    ua.NodeId(8100104, 1),  # classify camera image
    ua.NodeId(8200101, 1),  # detect objects
    ua.NodeId(8310101, 1),  # find qr codes
    ua.NodeId(4200102, 1),  # apply camera setting
]

# parse schema
schema = schema_parser.parse(target_nodes)

# set override options
override_options: List[OverrideOptions] = [
    OverrideOptions(
        node_id=ua.NodeId.from_string("ns=1;i=100210"),
        name="Motion",
    ),
]

# generate code
code = generate_code(schema, override_options)

# write to file
with open(<filename>, "w") as file:
    file.write(code)
```

modules.name: voraus_opcua_generator.client_generator_python.package_base
documentation: Tool to create package stubs.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.client_generator_python.package_base.create_internal_module
documentation:
Create a module for a given object to contain the matching python class.

Args:
    target_path: Where to create the module.
    node: The node to represent in the module.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.client_generator_python.package_base.create_package_base
documentation:
Create an empty package at a given location, provided the target paths parent directory exists.

Args:
    target_path: Where to generate the package_base
    node: For which OPC UA node to generate it
    root: Whether the provided node is a root node

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.client_generator_python.package_base.render_obj
documentation:
Renders the python representation for a node with the node specific parameters.

And does so for all it's children in a recursive manner.

Args:
    node: Node of the OPC UA.
    target_path: Where to generate the nodes representation.

modules.name: voraus_opcua_generator.formatter
documentation: A collection fo format function, that is used by client generator.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.formatter.format_node_id
documentation:
Formats identifier of a node to a code string.

Args:
    node (NodeSchema): Schema of current node

Returns:
    str: Identifier as python code

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.formatter.format_class_name
documentation:
Formats object name to python class name.

Args:
    obj (ObjectSchema): Schema of current object

Returns:
    str: Object name as python class name

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.formatter.format_variable_name
documentation:
Formats variable name to python variable name.

Args:
    variable (VariableSchema): Schema of current variable

Returns:
    str: Variable name as python variable name

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.formatter.format_method_name
documentation:
Formats method name to python function name.

Args:
    method (MethodSchema): Schema of current method

Returns:
    str: Method name as python function name

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.formatter.format_method_args
documentation:
Formats method input arguments to python function args.

Args:
    method (MethodSchema): Schema of current method

Returns:
    str: Methond input arguments as python function args

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.formatter.format_method_return
documentation:
Formats method output arguments to python function result typing.

Args:
    method (MethodSchema): Schema of current method

Returns:
    str: Method output as python function result typing

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.formatter.format_method_call_args
documentation:
Formats method input arguments to ua call arguments.

Args:
    method (MethodSchema): Schema of current method

Returns:
    str: Method input as ua.Variant array

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.formatter.format_arg_name
documentation:
Formats argument name to a function arg name.

Args:
    arg (ArgumentSchema): Schema of current argument

Returns:
    str: Argument name as function arg name

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.formatter.format_arg_type
documentation:
Formats argument type to ua.Type.

Args:
    arg (ArgumentSchema): Schema of current argument

Returns:
    str: Argument type as ua.Type

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.formatter.format_arg_variant
documentation:
Formats argument as ua.Variant.

Args:
    arg (ArgumentSchema): Schema of current argument

Returns:
    str: Argument as ua.Variant

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.formatter.snake_case
documentation:
Transforms a string to a snake case.

Args:
    text (str): Input string

Returns:
    str: Transformed snake_case string

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.formatter.format_doc_string
documentation:
Splits a string to multiple lines with a max length of 100.

Args:
    doc (str): A long string

Returns:
    List[str]: List of formated strings

modules.name: voraus_opcua_generator.client_generator_python
documentation: A generator for an OPC UA python client based on an XML specification.

modules.name: voraus_opcua_generator.client_generator_python.utils
documentation: Contains utilities for the OPC UA python client builder.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.client_generator_python.utils.escape_keywords
documentation:
Escape input by appending an underscore in case it matches one of pythons keywords or builtins.

Args:
    input_word: The string to escape.

Returns:
    The escaped string, like "yield_".

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.client_generator_python.utils.input_typehint
documentation:
Format a list of arguments as input typehint.

Escape arguments called like python keywords.

Args:
    arguments: A list of arguments to format.
    optional: Whether all arguments should be marked as optional.
              This is useful upon generation of callback functions,
              which do not necessarily consume all available arguments.

Returns:
    The typehint as string

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.client_generator_python.utils.to_module
documentation:
Format a list of nodes as a module string.

Args:
    node_list: A hierarchically ordered list to be represented in dot notation.

Returns:
    The module path

modules.name: voraus_opcua_generator
documentation: voraus OPC UA Generator.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.get_app_name

Returns the human-readable and prettified name of the application.

Returns:

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.get_app_version

documentation: Contains functions to handle rst files.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.rst.headline_from_path
documentation:
Creates a camel case and space separated headline from file path.

Args:
    path: The file path.

Returns:
    The formatted headline.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.rst.write_root_rst_file
documentation:
Write the root rst file.

Args:
    xml_file : XML file of the OPC UA server.
    root_nodes : OPC UA root nodes.
    rst_dir : Directory of the rst file.
    rst_file_prefix : Prefix of the rst file.

modules.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.variable
documentation: Contains the variable documentation builder.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.variable.render_variable
documentation:
Render an rst based on the according Template.

Args:

Returns:

modules.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.utils
documentation: Contains utilities for the OPC UA documentation builder.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.utils.escape_rst_special_chars
documentation:
Escapes the "_" or newline special chars in the rst file.

Args:
    text: RST File

Returns:
    :Rst with escaped special chars

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.utils.split_mixed_case_words
documentation:
Convert mixed case words in a text into a list of them.

Retain acronyms as words. Treat numbers as words.

Args:
    text: The string to split.

Returns:
    A list of words contained in the provided text name.
    The first word is guaranteed to be rather empty instead of a number.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.utils.mixed_to_pascal_case
documentation:
Convert the mixed cased object names to PascalCase.

Args:
    text: The text to format.

Returns:
    Text in PascalCase.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.utils.mixed_to_snake_case
documentation:
Converts the mixed cased argument names to snake case.

Args:
    text: The text to format.

Returns:
    Text in snake_case.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.utils.check_gitignore
documentation:
Initializes the gitignore.

Args:
    rst_dir : Directory of the rst file.
    gitignore_file : Path of the gitignore file.

Raises:
    KeyError: Raises KeyError if the gitignore_entry is not included in the gitignore file.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.utils.check_index_content
documentation:
Checks if the name of the created rst file is included in the index.rst.

Args:
    doc_dir : Directory of the documentation.
    rst_file_prefix : Name of the xml file. Used to name the rst file.

Raises:
    KeyError: Raises a KeyError if the rst toc (table of contents) entry is missing in the index file.

methods.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.argument.Argument.py_type
documentation:
Provide a python type, while taking into account whether it is one value or an array of them.

If the length is fixed, it's represented as a tuple; if not, as a list.

Returns:
    A string in the form of a python typehint describing the given type.
Handles the arguments of OPC UA method nodes.

documentation: Contains the OPC UAObject representation.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.obj.render_obj
documentation:
Renders the RST template for a node with the node specific parameters.

Args:

    rst_dir : Directionary of the rst file.
    rst_file_prefix : Prefix of the rst file.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.obj.get_templates
documentation:
Gets the rendered children, method and variable templates to render the node.

Args:
    node : Current OPC_UA node
    rst_file_prefix : Prefix of the imported xml file.

Returns:
    The rendered templates children_temp, method_temp, variable_temp

modules.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.types
documentation: Contains UA Python type mappings.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.types.default_value
documentation:
Provide a string of a near-zero default value for a given python typehint in its string representation.

Args:
    py_typehint: A Python typehint in string representation

Return:
    A string of the near-zero default value.

Raises:
    NotImplementedError: If a (yet) unsupported typehint is encountered.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.types.py_type
documentation:
For a given ua.VariantTypes name provide a python typehint, that represents it.

Args:
    variant_type: The name of the ua.VariantType

Return:
    A typehint matching the provided ua.VariantType description.

Raises:
    NotImplementedError: If a (yet) unsupported VariantType description is encountered.

modules.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.parser

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.parser.get_objects_node_data
documentation:
Objects node data according OPC UA specification.

More information on https://files.opcfoundation.org/schemas/UA/1.02/Opc.Ua.NodeSet2.xml.

Return :
    The node data of the root node.

functions.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.parser.parse_opcua_xml
documentation:
Parses the XML of an OPC UA Server and adds children to the nodes.

Args:
    path: Path of the XML file

Returns:
    : Parsed nodes with children

methods.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.parser.HasNoParent.__init__
documentation:
Spawn a HasNoPArent exception for the given node.

Args:
    node: A root node that (allegedly) has no parent.

Exception raised for errors while accessing the parent attribute of nodes that have none.

Attributes:
    node -- node which has no parent

documentation:
Render an rst section according to the template.

Args:

Raises:
    ValueError: If the node is not an input- or output argument.

Returns:
    Rendered RST template for the UAMethod.

documentation:
Emit an ordered list of child nodes, which represent methods of this node.

Order the elements by `.data.nodeid`.

documentation:
Emit an ordered list of Nodes which represent child objects of this Node.

Order the elements by `.data.nodeid`.

methods.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.node.Node.path_text
documentation:
Creates the path text for the rst File.

Raises:
    ValueError: Raised if the path is none.

Returns:
    The path text as an string.

methods.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.node.Node.namespace
documentation:
Gets the namespace of an opcua node.

documentation:
Gets the access level information from the acess level integer.

Raises:

Returns:
    The accesslevel

Returns:

methods.name: voraus_opcua_generator.doc_builder.node.Node.any_method_has_output_arguments
documentation:

classes.name: voraus_opcua_generator.data_generator_legacy.generator.LegacyWrapper

methods.name: voraus_opcua_generator.data_generator_legacy.generator.LegacyWrapper.__init__
documentation:
Construct a wrapper of a subset of sibling nodes from a larger set and give it a title.

Args:
    nodes: A collection of path-initialized nodes.
    title: The title to call the wrapped collection of sibling-nodes.
    partial_siblings: A not necessarily complete list of sibling nodes to complete and wrap.

Raises:
    KeyError: When the first element of partial_siblings can not be found in nodes.
    HasNoParent: If the first element of partial_siblings is the root node.
    ValueError: If not all the given partial_siblings are in fact siblings.

methods.name: voraus_opcua_generator.data_generator_legacy.generator.LegacyWrapper.docstring_title
documentation:
Provide a docstring title line hinting its own auto generation.

Return:
    A docstring title line.

Wrap sibling nodes under an arbitrary name.

Extend the list of siblings to its full extent with respect to the provides ast.
